plugin.name: Claude Code Optimizer
plugin.description: Analyze Claude Code session logs and discover per-project configuration optimizations to cut token waste.
plugin.longDescription: cc-optimizer scans your Claude Code session history (~/.claude/projects) with zero-config auto-detection. It identifies per-project quota waste: expensive models on cheap work, bloated MCP servers, unused plugins, cache misses. Generates actionable findings with $ estimates based on your actual token usage. Writes safe, reversible config changes (dry-run by default).
